book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve belgian food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves european food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 11:15 on wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called alpha-milton guest house
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
